# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
  - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
  - '[[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && echo -e "Host *\n\tStrictHostKeyChecking no\n\n" > ~/.ssh/config'

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Building with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Build completed"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
  only:
    - merge_requests

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Testing with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - npm test
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Deploying with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Generating release notes from MR title and description"
    - git config --global user.email "gitlab@company.com"
    - git config --global user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git tag "release-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - git push origin "release-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - echo "Release tag created: release-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
  only:
    - master
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.company.com

release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Generating release notes from MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - |
      echo "## Release Notes" > release_notes.md
      echo "Generated from merge request: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" >> release_notes.md
      echo "" >> release_notes.md
      echo "### Description" >> release_notes.md
      echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" >> release_notes.md
      echo "" >> release_notes.md
      echo "### Commit" >> release_notes.md
      echo "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE" >> release_notes.md
    - git add release_notes.md
    - git commit -m "docs: update release notes from MR $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - git push origin HEAD
  only:
    - master
